title: Fly Hack
description: It's fly-hack. Sorta. It more of boosts you but it counts!
body:
This mod adds a configurable keybind to boost your player.

When in-game open the pause menu and go to `Options` -> `Controls` -> `Keybinds` -> And find the "Fly-Hack" category and set the "Boost" key to whatever key you want! By default this key is R.

This mod doesn't work on any server and the server **must** have this mod installed server-side for it to work on the client, I do have a version that doesn't need the server-side mod but it is not publicly available.

While it can be abused for flight, that wasn’t the original intention - I actually stumbled upon it by accident while testing another mod and thought it was funny enough to release.

The boost is genuinely useful for building. Whether you’re in singleplayer or creative mode, it lets you zip around much faster than standard creative flight without needing to constantly adjust your flight speed or switch game modes.

⚠️ _**I do not condone using this mod for cheating in other servers, and I am not liable for what you do with this.**_
